title: React Deep Dive: Performance & Advanced Patterns
summary: Enhance your existing React skills with performance optimization techniques and advanced component patterns.
personalizationNote: Leverage your React experience and focus on refining rendering performance and reusable patterns.
videoStyle: Interactive code demos and profiling tools
learningObjectives: Implement compound and render prop patterns
knowledgeChecks: Name a hook used to memoize functions.
What is a render prop pattern used for?
narrationScript:
Scene 1: Spotting React Performance Issues
Check which components re-render often and why. Avoid passing new objects or functions as props without memoization.

Scene 2: Optimizing with React.memo and Hooks
Wrap components with React.memo, and use hooks like useCallback to memoize functions and reduce updates.

Scene 3: Advanced Component Patterns
Compound components let users compose APIs intuitively; render props enable dynamic UI composition; HOCs add features to components.

Scene 4: Profiling and Measuring React Performance
Record interactive sessions, spot bottlenecks in flamegraphs, and prioritize fixes where React spends most time.

slides.title: Spotting React Performance Issues
slides.speakerNotes: Understanding what triggers React to re-render helps you optimize hotspots that can degrade user experience.
slides.narration: Check which components re-render often and why. Avoid passing new objects or functions as props without memoization.

slides.title: Optimizing with React.memo and Hooks
slides.speakerNotes: React.memo prevents needless re-renders; hooks can optimize expensive computations or event handlers.
slides.narration: Wrap components with React.memo, and use hooks like useCallback to memoize functions and reduce updates.
slides.visualCue: Code before/after applying React.memo and hooks

slides.title: Advanced Component Patterns
slides.speakerNotes: These patterns let you write highly reusable and flexible UI components, improving maintainability.
slides.narration: Compound components let users compose APIs intuitively; render props enable dynamic UI composition; HOCs add features to components.
slides.visualCue: Diagram of component relationships using patterns

slides.title: Profiling and Measuring React Performance
slides.speakerNotes: Profiling shows what parts of your app are costly. React DevTools gives actionable insights to guide optimizations.
slides.narration: Record interactive sessions, spot bottlenecks in flamegraphs, and prioritize fixes where React spends most time.
slides.visualCue: React Profiler flamegraph with key areas highlighted
